page_metadata.biotools__summary: Large-scale directed network inference with multivariate transfer entropy and hierarchical statistical testing | The Information Dynamics Toolkit xl (IDTxl) is a comprehensive software package for efficient inference of networks and their node dynamics from multivariate time series data using information theory.
